content.content:
1→package main
     2→
     3→import (
     4→    "fmt"
     5→    "os"
     6→
     7→    tea "github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea"
     8→
     9→    "github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/analysis"
    10→    "github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/apps"
    11→    "github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/arf"
    12→    "github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/bluegreen"
    13→    "github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/certs"
    14→    "github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/debug"
    15→    "github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/deploy"
    16→    "github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/domains"
    17→    "github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/env"
    18→    "github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/transflow"
    19→    "github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/ui"
    20→    "github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/version"
    21→)
    22→
    23→var controllerURL = getControllerURL()
    24→
    25→func getControllerURL() string {
    26→	// First check if PLOY_CONTROLLER is explicitly set
    27→	if url := os.Getenv("PLOY_CONTROLLER"); url != "" {
    28→		return url
    29→	}
    30→	
    31→	// Check if PLOY_APPS_DOMAIN is set for SSL endpoint
    32→	if domain := os.Getenv("PLOY_APPS_DOMAIN"); domain != "" {
    33→		// Check for environment-specific subdomain
    34→		if env := os.Getenv("PLOY_ENVIRONMENT"); env == "dev" {
    35→			return fmt.Sprintf("https://api.dev.%s/v1", domain)
    36→		}
    37→		return fmt.Sprintf("https://api.%s/v1", domain)
    38→	}
    39→	
    40→	// Default to dev environment endpoint
    41→	return "https://api.dev.ployman.app/v1"
    42→}
    43→
    44→func main() {
    45→	if len(os.Args) > 1 {
    46→		switch os.Args[1] {
    47→        case "transflow":
    48→            transflow.TransflowCmd(os.Args[2:], controllerURL)
    49→		case "analyze":
    50→			analysis.AnalyzeCmd(os.Args[2:], controllerURL)
    51→		case "apps":
    52→			apps.AppsCmd(os.Args[2:], controllerURL)
    53→		case "push":
    54→			deploy.PushCmd(os.Args[2:], controllerURL)
    55→		case "open":
    56→			deploy.OpenCmd(os.Args[2:])
    57→		case "env":
    58→			env.EnvCmd(os.Args[2:], controllerURL)
    59→		case "domains":
    60→			domains.DomainsCmd(os.Args[2:], controllerURL)
    61→		case "certs":
    62→			certs.CertsCmd(os.Args[2:], controllerURL)
    63→		case "debug":
    64→			debug.DebugCmd(os.Args[2:], controllerURL)
    65→		case "rollback":
    66→			debug.RollbackCmd(os.Args[2:], controllerURL)
    67→		case "arf":
    68→			arf.ARFCmd(os.Args[2:], controllerURL)
    69→		case "bluegreen":
    70→			bluegreen.BlueGreenCmd(os.Args[2:], controllerURL)
    71→		case "version":
    72→			version.VersionCmd(os.Args[2:], controllerURL)
    73→		default:
    74→			ui.Usage()
    75→		}
    76→		return
    77→	}
    78→	p := tea.NewProgram(ui.Model{})
    79→	if err := p.Start(); err != nil {
    80→		fmt.Println("error:", err)
    81→		os.Exit(1)
    82→	}
    83→}
    84→

1→package common
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"fmt"
     5→	"io"
     6→	"net/http"
     7→	"os"
     8→	"time"
     9→
    10→	utils "github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/utils"
    11→)
    12→
    13→// DeployConfig contains all deployment parameters
    14→type DeployConfig struct {
    15→    App           string
    16→    Lane          string
    17→    MainClass     string
    18→    SHA           string
    19→    IsPlatform    bool   // true for ployman, false for ploy
    20→    BlueGreen     bool
    21→    Environment   string // dev, staging, prod
    22→    ControllerURL string
    23→    Metadata      map[string]string
    24→    Timeout       time.Duration
    25→}
    26→
    27→// DeployResult contains deployment outcome information
    28→type DeployResult struct {
    29→	Success      bool
    30→	Version      string
    31→	DeploymentID string
    32→	URL          string
    33→	Message      string
    34→}
    35→
    36→// SharedPush handles deployment for both ploy and ployman
    37→func SharedPush(config DeployConfig) (*DeployResult, error) {
    38→	// Validate configuration
    39→	if err := validateConfig(config); err != nil {
    40→		return nil, fmt.Errorf("invalid configuration: %w", err)
    41→	}
    42→
    43→	// Generate SHA if not provided
    44→	if config.SHA == "" {
    45→		if v := utils.GitSHA(); v != "" {
    46→			config.SHA = v
    47→		} else {
    48→			config.SHA = time.Now().Format("20060102-150405")
    49→		}
    50→	}

content.text: Let me read the critical orchestration and git provider files:

content.content:
1→package provider
     2→
     3→import "context"
     4→
     5→// GitProvider defines the interface for git forge providers (GitLab, GitHub, etc.)
     6→type GitProvider interface {
     7→	CreateOrUpdateMR(ctx context.Context, config MRConfig) (*MRResult, error)
     8→	ValidateConfiguration() error
     9→}
    10→
    11→// MRConfig contains all parameters needed to create or update a merge request
    12→type MRConfig struct {
    13→	RepoURL      string   // HTTPS repository URL (e.g., "https://gitlab.example.com/namespace/project.git")
    14→	SourceBranch string   // workflow branch name (e.g., "workflow/java17-migration/20250905")
    15→	TargetBranch string   // base_ref from config (e.g., "refs/heads/main")
    16→	Title        string   // MR title derived from workflow
    17→	Description  string   // MR description with step summaries
    18→	Labels       []string // default labels ["ploy", "tfl"]
    19→}
    20→
    21→// MRResult contains the result of MR creation or update
    22→type MRResult struct {
    23→	MRURL   string // GitLab MR web URL for browser access
    24→	MRID    int    // GitLab MR numeric ID for API operations
    25→	Created bool   // true if created, false if updated existing MR
    26→}
